CVE-2021-21240.title: httplib2 is a comprehensive HTTP client library for Python. In ht ...
CVE-2021-21240.description: httplib2 is a comprehensive HTTP client library for Python. In httplib2 before version 0.19.0, a malicious server which responds with long series of "\xa0" characters in the "www-authenticate" header may cause Denial of Service (CPU burn while parsing header) of the httplib2 client accessing said server. This is fixed in version 0.19.0 which contains a new implementation of auth headers parsing using the pyparsing library.
CVE-2021-21240.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.
